items.text: Urgent breaking news bed with deep subsonic pulse and layered organ drone, close-mic'd intimate texture with centered stereo placement, dark serious harmonic clusters, loopable 30-second track, 85 BPM in F# minor, used as an under-voice bed for urgent breaking news bulletins and major developments.

Warm neutral news bed with soft acoustic guitar fingerpicking pattern and gentle rhythmic pulse, natural room ambience with controlled stereo width, loopable 30-second instrumental track, 90 BPM in G major, used as a calm under-voice news bed for regular updates and morning headline segments.

Serious investigative news bed with bowed vibraphone and metallic resonance, slow undulating harmonic movement, mid-to-high register with airy spacious reverb, loopable 30-second track, 72 BPM in C minor, used as an under-voice bed for investigative features, creating tension without low-end muddiness.

Gentle human-interest news bed with soft harmonium drone and warm reed texture, low-mid sustained chords with subtle volume swells, warm cabin acoustic, loopable 30-second track, 70 BPM in D minor, used as a supportive under-voice news bed for feature reports, earthy and warm without competing with narration.

Energetic sports news bed with warm electric piano chord comping and soft shaker rhythm, relaxed mid-tempo groove with smooth attack, wide but soft stereo field leaving vocal space, loopable 30-second track, 92 BPM in D major, used as an upbeat under-voice sports bed for game highlights and score updates.

Bright financial news bed with marimba mallet pattern and clear melodic ostinato, soft attack with rounded tone, dry studio acoustic with tight stereo image, loopable 30-second track, 105 BPM in C major, used as an energetic under-voice news bed for market reports and business updates.

Tense weather warning bed with repeating marimba ostinato in the low register, dry close-mic'd percussive pattern with reverb swell tails, narrow stereo field with sudden wide bursts, loopable 30-second track, 100 BPM in E minor, used as a dramatic under-voice weather warning bed for severe weather advisories, creating rhythmic tension without sustained pads.

Intimate late-night news bed with melancholic solo cello melody and slow bow strokes, small room acoustic with close perspective, sparse and reflective, loopable 30-second instrumental track, 65 BPM in B minor, used as an under-voice news bed for late-night analysis and reflective segments.

Warm cinematic feature bed with sustained string pad and slow legato build, wide hall stereo with gentle dynamics, emotional mid-high warmth, loopable 30-second track, 85 BPM in E minor, used as an under-voice news bed for long-form documentary features and special reports.

Energetic headline update bed with rapid wood block rhythm and tuned percussion hits, dry tight production with minimal reverb, short slap delay for space, loopable 30-second track, 92 BPM in C minor, used as an under-voice bed for rapid news roundups and headline recaps.
